creator: david@dafnet.se
text:
So this is still a very broken port. This does not start after install. Nor does the packages. Can someone PLEASE at least remove the part of the Makefile that renames all xml-files to xml.sample. That's just terrible. Spent a few days now trying to make this work after reinstall. 

Just please test this after install and make the port work. It's so broken...
